name: Monthly Competitor Website Brief - Raw Nexus Import Test

parameters.content:
## Raw Nexus import test workflow
This workflow intentionally has no Nexus Webhook Trigger and no Nexus Submit Output node. Nexus should add those during import. Dynamic buyer values use NEXUS_CODE_SETUP(...) placeholders. Credentials are bound later through the Nexus credentials page.

values.skipSelectors: script, style, noscript, svg, img, nav, header, footer, form, iframe

nexusProduct.note: Importer should replace Manual Test Trigger with Nexus Webhook Trigger, add Nexus Runtime Context, and append Nexus Submit Output.
